content.text:
<recommended_plugins>
Here is a list of plugins that are available but not installed. If the user's query would benefit from one of these plugins, use the `request_plugin_install` tool to suggest that they install it. Pass the parenthesized ID as `plugin_id`. For example, suggest the Google Drive plugin if the query could possibly be better answered with access to Google Drive.

- Atlassian Rovo (atlassian-rovo@openai-curated-remote)
- Box (box@openai-curated-remote)
- Figma (figma@openai-curated-remote)
- Gmail (gmail@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Calendar (google-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Google Drive (google-drive@openai-curated-remote)
- Notion (notion@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Calendar (outlook-calendar@openai-curated-remote)
- Outlook Email (outlook-email@openai-curated-remote)
- SharePoint (sharepoint@openai-curated-remote)
- Slack (slack@openai-curated-remote)
- Teams (teams@openai-curated-remote)
</recommended_plugins>

Review the code changes against the base branch 'main'. The merge base commit for this comparison is 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc. Run `git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc` to inspect the changes relative to main. Provide prioritized, actionable findings.

input.input: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"grep -nE \"branch-diff reviews|60dc076|code-review\" /Users/cysp/.codex/memories/MEMORY.md | head -20 && cat /Users/cysp/.agents/skills/code-review/SKILL.md && git status --short && git diff --stat 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc && git diff --find-renames 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git log --oneline 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc..HEAD; find . -maxdepth 3 -iname '*standards*' -o -name 'CONTRIBUTING.md' -o -name 'AGENTS.md'; git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/authentication.ts packages/oidc/src/issuer-adapter.ts packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/src/issuer.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy-rules.ts workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/installation-token-issuance.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat package.json; corepack pnpm test -- --runInBand","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat CONTRIBUTING.md; cat packages/oidc-issuer-github-actions/package.json; cat workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/package.json; sed -n '1,240p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy.ts; sed -n '240,650p' workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy.ts","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"nl -ba workers/cyspbot-token-exchange/src/policy/token-policy.ts | sed -n '220,245p'; corepack pnpm typecheck && corepack pnpm lint","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"git show 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc:packages/github-actions-oidc/src/github-actions-principal.ts | sed -n '1,260p'; git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- test/token-policy-rules.test.ts | grep -E '^[-+].*(repository_owner_id|repository_id|sub|workflow_ref|event_name)' | head -100","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat vitest.config.ts; git diff 60dc0766e6704d2de277b6975b03ce722d5f19bc -- vitest.config.ts package.json; corepack pnpm knip --no-progress","workdir":"/Users/cysp/src/cyspbot","yield_time_ms":1000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output); if(r.session_id) text(`SESSION_ID=${r.session_id}`);

content.text: {"findings":[],"overall_correctness":"patch is correct","overall_explanation":"No actionable correctness issues were identified in the diff. Type checking, linting, and dependency analysis pass; the test suite could not run because the sandbox prohibits binding to 127.0.0.1.","overall_confidence_score":0.86}
